system.description:
Swarm Protocol is the Drone Commander discipline for runners who decided that the future of small machines was numbers. Practitioners specialize in micro-drones operating under shared behavioral firmware: dozens of small flying or crawling units acting as one coordinated entity. The individual drones are cheap and disposable; the firmware that binds them is anything but.

On the job, the Swarm Protocol commander is the runner trailed by a soft, mechanical cloud. Their entry feature is Disperse and Reform: the swarm may scout, harass, and obscure as a single creature occupying up to a medium area; once per encounter it may move through obstacles as if intangible and reform on the far side.
system.grants: Disperse and Reform: micro-drone swarm acts as a single unit; once per encounter passes intangibly through obstacles.

wizard.tagline: Run the cloud. Let the cloud do the work
